原文: Tricks To Becoming A More Patient① Person
翻译: 成为一个更有耐心的人的技巧
必背词汇:
① patient /ˈpeɪʃnt/ adj. 有耐心的 n. 病人
Ⓡ patience /ˈpeɪʃns/ n. 耐心
Ⓡ impatient /ɪmˈpeɪʃnt/ adj. 不耐烦的
Ⓡ tolerate /ˈtɒləreɪt/ v. 忍受
Ⓡ tolerance /ˈtɒlərəns/ n. 容忍

原文: Here's a riddle: What do traffic jams, long lines and waiting for a vacation to start all have in common? There's one answer:G. They're all situations where we could use a little extra patience.
翻译: 这里有一个谜语：交通堵塞、排长队和等待假期开始有什么共同点？有一个答案：它们都是我们可以多用一点耐心的情境。

原文: In the Digital Age, we're used to having what we need immediately and right at our fingertips②. However, research suggests that if we practiced patience, we'd be a whole lot better off③. Here are several tricks.
翻译: 在数字时代，我们习惯于立即且触手可及地获得所需。然而，研究表明，如果我们练习耐心，我们会好得多。以下是几个技巧。
必背词汇:
② fingertip /ˈfɪŋɡətɪp/ n. 指尖
Ⓡ finger /ˈfɪŋɡə(r)/ n. 手指
Ⓡ tip /tɪp/ n. 尖端；小费
Ⓡ at one's fingertips 近在手边；随时可用
③ better off /ˌbetər ˈɒf/ adj. 境况更好的；更富裕的
Ⓡ well off /ˌwel ˈɒf/ adj. 富裕的
Ⓡ worse off /ˌwɜːs ˈɒf/ adj. 境况更差的

④ gratitude /ˈɡrætɪtjuːd/ n. 感激，感谢
Ⓡ grateful /ˈɡreɪtfl/ adj. 感激的
Ⓡ ungrateful /ʌnˈɡreɪtfl/ adj. 不感激的
Ⓡ appreciate /əˈpriːʃieɪt/ v. 欣赏；感激

原文: Thankfulness has a lot of benefits: Research shows it makes us happier, less stressed⑤ and even more optimistic⑥. E. It can also help us practice more patience. "Showing thankfulness can foster⑦ self-control," said Ye Li, researcher at the University of California.
翻译: 感恩有很多好处：研究表明它让我们更快乐、压力更小，甚至更乐观。它还能帮助我们练习更多耐心。加州大学的研究员李叶说：“表达感恩可以培养自控力。”
必背词汇:
⑤ stress /stres/ n. 压力 v. 强调
Ⓡ stressed /strest/ adj. 有压力的
Ⓡ stressful /ˈstresfl/ adj. 有压力的
Ⓡ distress /dɪˈstres/ n. 痛苦；危难
⑥ optimistic /ˌɒptɪˈmɪstɪk/ adj. 乐观的
Ⓡ optimism /ˈɒptɪmɪzəm/ n. 乐观
Ⓡ pessimist /ˈpesɪmɪst/ n. 悲观主义者
Ⓡ pessimistic /ˌpesɪˈmɪstɪk/ adj. 悲观的
⑦ foster /ˈfɒstə(r)/ v. 培养；促进
Ⓡ cultivate /ˈkʌltɪveɪt/ v. 培养
Ⓡ nurture /ˈnɜːtʃə(r)/ v. 培育

原文: Instant gratification⑧(满足) may seem like the most "feel good" option at the time, but psychology research suggests waiting for things actually makes us happier in the long run⑨. And the only way for us to get into the habit of waiting is to practice. B. Start with small tasks. Put off watching your favorite show until the weekend or wait 10 extra minutes before going for that cake. You'll soon find that the more patience you practice, the more you start to apply it to other, more annoying⑩ situations.
翻译: 即时满足在当时似乎是最“感觉良好”的选择，但心理学研究表明，等待事物实际上从长远来看让我们更快乐。而我们养成等待习惯的唯一方法就是练习。从小的任务开始。把你最喜欢的节目推迟到周末再看，或者多等10分钟再去吃那块蛋糕。你很快会发现，你练习的耐心越多，你就越开始将其应用到其他更恼人的情境中。
必背词汇:
⑧ gratification /ˌɡrætɪfɪˈkeɪʃn/ n. 满足
Ⓡ gratify /ˈɡrætɪfaɪ/ v. 使满足
Ⓡ satisfy /ˈsætɪsfaɪ/ v. 使满意
Ⓡ satisfaction /ˌsætɪsˈfækʃn/ n. 满意
⑨ in the long run /ɪn ðə lɒŋ rʌn/ phr. 从长远来看
Ⓡ in the short run /ɪn ðə ʃɔːt rʌn/ phr. 从短期来看
Ⓡ ultimately /ˈʌltɪmətli/ adv. 最终
⑩ annoying /əˈnɔɪɪŋ/ adj. 恼人的
Ⓡ annoy /əˈnɔɪ/ v. 使恼怒
Ⓡ annoyance /əˈnɔɪəns/ n. 恼怒
Ⓡ irritated /ˈɪrɪteɪtɪd/ adj. 被激怒的

⑪ uncomfortable /ʌnˈkʌmftəbl/ adj. 不舒服的；不自在的
Ⓡ comfortable /ˈkʌmftəbl/ adj. 舒适的
Ⓡ discomfort /dɪsˈkʌmfət/ n. 不适
Ⓡ comfort /ˈkʌmfət/ n. 舒适 v. 安慰

原文: So many of us have the belief that being comfortable is the only state we will tolerate, and when we experience something outside of our comfort zone⑫, we get impatient about the circumstances⑬. You should learn to say to yourself,"F. This is merely uncomfortable, not intolerable⑭." You'll then gradually become more patient.
翻译: 我们许多人相信舒适是我们唯一能容忍的状态，而当我们经历舒适区之外的事情时，我们会对环境变得不耐烦。你应该学会对自己说：“这只是不舒服，并非无法忍受。”然后你会逐渐变得更有耐心。
必背词汇:
⑫ comfort zone /ˈkʌmfət zəʊn/ n. 舒适区
Ⓡ zone /zəʊn/ n. 区域
Ⓡ area /ˈeəriə/ n. 地区；领域
⑬ circumstance /ˈsɜːkəmstəns/ n. 环境；情况
Ⓡ situation /ˌsɪtʃuˈeɪʃn/ n. 情况
Ⓡ condition /kənˈdɪʃn/ n. 条件；状况
⑭ intolerable /ɪnˈtɒlərəbl/ adj. 无法忍受的
Ⓡ tolerate /ˈtɒləreɪt/ v. 忍受
Ⓡ tolerance /ˈtɒlərəns/ n. 容忍
Ⓡ intolerant /ɪnˈtɒlərənt/ adj. 不容忍的
